parameters.formDescription: Add, Update or Cancel a Meeting

parameters.completionMessage: Invalid emails found. Please go back and correct them.
No Meeting ID provided. Please go back and enter the Meeting ID.

parameters.subject: =Meeting Cancelled: {{ $('Edit Fields').item.json.Title }}
parameters.message: =Your meeting has been cancelled.  Title: {{ $('Edit Fields').item.json.Title }} Date/Time:{{ $('Edit Fields').item.json['Date/Time'] }}  Attendees: {{ $('Edit Fields').item.json.Attendees }} Meeting ID: {{ $('Edit Fields').item.json.ID }}

parameters.completionMessage: A meeting already exists within 1 hour of your selected time. Please choose a different slot with at least 1 hour gap.
=Your meeting has been added. Your Meeting ID is: {{ $('Edit Fields').item.json.ID }} — Please save this ID to update or cancel later.

parameters.subject: =Meeting Invitation: {{ $('Edit Fields').item.json.Title }}
parameters.message: =You have been invited to a meeting!  Title: {{ $('Edit Fields').item.json.Title }} Date/Time: {$('Edit Fields').item.json['Date/Time']{ $('Edit Fields').item.json.DateTime }} Attendees: {{ $('Edit Fields').item.json.Attendees }} Gist: {{ $('Edit Fields').item.json.gist }} Meeting ID: {{ $('Edit Fields').item.json.ID }}  Please save your Meeting ID for future updates or cancellations.

parameters.completionMessage: No meeting found with this ID. Please check and try again.

parameters.subject: =Meeting Updated: {{ $json.Title }}
parameters.message: =Your meeting has been updated.  Title: {{ $json.Title }} Date/Time:{{ $json['Date/Time'] }}  Attendees: {{ $json.Attendees }} Gist:{{ $json.Gist }}  Status: {{ $json.Status }} Meeting ID: {{ $json.ID }}

parameters.subject: =Reminder: {{ $json.Title }} Meeting in 30 min
parameters.message: =Reminder: Your meeting is starting in 30 minutes!  Title: {{ $json.Title }} Date/Time: {{ $json['Date/Time'] }} Attendees: {{ $json.Attendees }} Gist: {{ $json.Gist }} Meeting ID: {{ $json.ID }}
